retry_reason: Put operations decrement the refcount unconditionally; retrying would cause a double-free (use-after-free) as the reference is already released.
contract_summary: Releases a drm_syncobj reference that is stored in the hwctx's priv structure. This is a standard put wrapper: it drops one reference on the syncobj object. After calling this function, the caller must not access hwctx->priv->syncobj. The syncobj handle itself is owned by userspace and will be closed separately; this function only releases the kernel-side reference. There is no return value — the operation is always performed.

judge.reason: The function's only purpose is to call drm_syncobj_put on a stored syncobj pointer. There is no other logic, comments, or error handling; it is a pure reference-release wrapper.
